top_stories.title: Megaworld continues to pare down MREIT stake ahead of Wave 5 asset infusion
top_stories.source: Manila Bulletin Business Property JSON Fallback

top_stories.title: DOF: LGUs can reduce assessment levels and tax rates under RPVARA to lower property taxes
top_stories.summary: The Department of Finance (DOF) highlighted that the Real Property Valuation and Assessment Reform Act (RPVARA) does not automatically increase real property taxes, as local government units (LGUs) retain the authority to reduce assessment levels, tax rates, or both to lower property taxes based on their priorities...
